channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [DMR] DMR Engineering: Final Dividend of ₹0.14 Recommended
item.description:
DMR Engineering Ltd's board approved the audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, and recommended a final dividend of ₹0.14 per share, subject to shareholder approval. The board also appointed Mr. Divay Mittal and Mr. Arvind Bhat as Executive Directors for terms of 5 and 2 years, respectively. Mr. Krishan Kumar Gupta retired as Non-executive Director, and Mr. Nakul Yadav was appointed as Internal Auditor. The 17th AGM notice was approved, and Dilip Swarnkar & Associates were appointed as Scrutinizer.

  • DMR Engineering recommends a final dividend of ₹0.14 per equity share for FY26.
  • Divay Mittal and Arvind Bhat appointed as Executive Directors, effective May 09, 2026.
  • Krishan Kumar Gupta retired as Non-executive Director on May 09, 2026.
  • Nakul Yadav appointed as Internal Auditor for FY26-27 and FY27-28.
  • Standalone and Consolidated Audited Financial Results for FY26 approved.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DMR Hydroengineering & Infrastructures Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [ATLANTAELE] Atlanta Electricals: Independent Directors Appointed to Subsidiary
item.description:
Atlanta Electricals Ltd announces the appointment of Mr. Dukhabandhu Rath and Mrs. Jinkal Darshan Patel as Non-Executive Independent Directors to its material unlisted subsidiary, Atlanta Trafo Limited. The appointments, recommended by the Board of Directors on May 9, 2026, are for a first term of five consecutive years and are subject to member approval at the General Meeting scheduled for May 12, 2026. These appointments comply with Regulation 24(1) of the SEBI LODR Regulations.

  • Mr. Dukhabandhu Rath and Mrs. Jinkal Darshan Patel appointed as Independent Directors.
  • Appointments are for a five-year term, subject to member approval.
  • Appointments comply with SEBI LODR Regulations.
  • General Meeting for approval scheduled on May 12, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Atlanta Electricals Ltd | Category: Corporate Governance

item.title: [VOITHPAPR] Voith Paper Fabrics Board Meeting on May 20, 2026
item.description:
Voith Paper Fabrics India Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 20, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the fourth quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider recommending a dividend, if any, on the company's equity shares for the same period. The trading window has been closed from April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results.

  • Board to consider FY26 audited financial results.
  • Dividend recommendation to be discussed at the meeting.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026.
  • Meeting scheduled for May 20, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VOITH PAPER FABRICS INDIA LTD.-$ | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [KKCL] Kewal Kiran Clothing FY26: Revenue ₹973.47 Mn
item.description:
Kewal Kiran Clothing Ltd. announced audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The Board of Directors approved the results in their meeting held on May 9, 2026. Revenue from operations for the year stood at ₹950.26 lakhs with other income of ₹23.21 lakhs, totaling ₹973.47 lakhs. The board also declared a second interim dividend of ₹2 per equity share.

  • Kewal Kiran Clothing's FY26 revenue from operations reached ₹950.26 lakhs.
  • The Board declared a second interim dividend of ₹2 per share.
  • The results were reviewed by the Audit Committee and approved by the Board on May 9, 2026.
  • Other income for FY26 includes a realised gain of ₹855 lakhs and an unrealised gain of ₹622 lakhs.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KEWAL KIRAN CLOTHING LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SAHYADRI] Sahyadri Industries Approves FY26 Results, ₹1.5 Dividend
item.description:
Sahyadri Industries Ltd's board approved the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. They recommended a final dividend of ₹1.5 per equity share for FY26, subject to member approval. The board also appointed Mr. Sunil Mahendra Suratwala as an Additional Director (Non-executive and Independent) and re-appointed Mrs. Moushmi Sahil Shaha and Mr. Ankem Sri Prasad Mohan as Independent Directors for second terms.

  • Audited financial results for quarter and year ended March 31, 2026 approved.
  • Final dividend of ₹1.5 per share recommended for FY26.
  • Sunil Mahendra Suratwala appointed as Additional Director.
  • Moushmi Sahil Shaha re-appointed as Independent Director.
  • Ankem Sri Prasad Mohan re-appointed as Independent Director.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SAHYADRI INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [YAANENT] Yaan Enterprises Approves Standalone Financials for FY26
item.description:
Yaan Enterprises Ltd's Board of Directors approved the Standalone Audited Financial Statement for the year ended March 31, 2026, in compliance with SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. The board meeting, held on May 9, 2026, at 16:00 hours (IST) and concluded at 17:30 hours (IST), also approved the Standalone Audited Financial Results under Ind AS for the quarter and year ended on the same date. The information is available on the company's website.

  • Yaan Enterprises approved standalone audited financial results for FY26.
  • The decision was made in compliance with SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.
  • The board meeting occurred on May 9, 2026.
  • Standalone results are under Ind AS for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Yaan Enterprises Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [KKCL] Kewal Kiran Clothing FY26: Revenue ₹973.47 Mn
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Kewal Kiran Clothing Ltd. announced its standalone and consolidated audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026. The Board of Directors approved the results in their meeting held on May 9, 2026. The results include audited financial results for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The board also declared a second interim dividend of ₹2 per equity share, with the record date for payment being May 14, 2026. Revenue from operations for the year stood at ₹95,026 lakhs.

  • Standalone revenue from operations for FY26 is ₹95,026 lakhs.
  • The Board declared a second interim dividend of ₹2 per share.
  • The Board Meeting was held on May 9, 2026, to approve the results.
  • Other income includes realised and unrealised gains.
  • Basic EPS for the year ended March 31, 2026, is ₹21.46.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KEWAL KIRAN CLOTHING LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [PERVASIVE] Pervasive Commodities: Promoter Reclassification Application
item.description:
Pervasive Commodities Ltd has submitted an application to BSE Limited on May 9, 2026, for the reclassification of certain promoters to the public category. The outgoing promoters include Enigma Merchants LLP holding 5,04,900 shares (0.06%) and Winspire Project Consultants Private Limited holding 41,000 shares (0.00%). The total shareholding of promoters seeking reclassification is 5,45,900 shares, representing 0.06% of the company.

  • Pervasive Commodities seeks to reclassify promoters to public category.
  • Application submitted to BSE on May 9, 2026.
  • Enigma Merchants LLP and Winspire Project Consultants are the outgoing promoters.
  • Total of 5,45,900 shares (0.06%) held by promoters seeking reclassification.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Pervasive Commodities Ltd | Category: Promoter Reclassification

item.title: [PURPLEWAVE] Purple Wave Infocom Holds 1st EGM for FY 2026-27
item.description:
Purple Wave Infocom Ltd. held its 1st Extra-Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) for the fiscal year 2026-27 on May 9, 2026, at 2:00 PM IST via video conferencing. The meeting addressed items outlined in the EGM notice dated March 26, 2026, including the approval of the Employee Stock Option Plan 2026 and its extension to eligible employees of group companies. The meeting was conducted in accordance with regulatory guidelines, with e-voting facilities provided to members.

  • Purple Wave Infocom held its 1st EGM for FY 2026-27 on May 9, 2026.
  • The EGM was conducted via video conferencing at 2:00 PM IST.
  • Approval of the Employee Stock Option Plan 2026 was on the agenda.
  • E-voting facilities were provided to members as per regulatory norms.
  • Scrutinizer's report and voting results will be disseminated separately.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Purple Wave Infocom Ltd | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [MEDIASSIST] Medi Assist Healthcare: Audited Financial Results Approved
item.description:
The Board of Directors of Medi Assist Healthcare Services Limited approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The audit reports, issued by M/s. MSKA & Associates LLP, have an unmodified opinion. The Board Meeting was held on May 09, 2026, commencing at 02.30 p.m. (IST) and concluding at 05.30 p.m. (IST). The consolidated financial results include the results of several subsidiaries.

  • Medi Assist Healthcare Services approved audited financial results for FY26.
  • Auditors' report by MSKA & Associates LLP has an unmodified opinion.
  • Board meeting was held on May 09, 2026.
  • Consolidated results include multiple subsidiaries.
  • A search and seizure operation was carried out by the Directorate of Enforcement at certain offices of a wholly owned subsidiary.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Medi Assist Healthcare Services Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result
